positions.title: Associate Software Engineer
responsibilities: Led development of a client-facing onboarding platform replacing fragmented email and FTP workflows with centralized file exchange, due date tracking, and client approvals
Built a real-time job batching platform with React, Node.js, and WebSockets enabling concurrent coordination of complex production workflows, cutting required man-hours by 30%

Engineered a serverless file ingestion system (AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, S3) unifying a legacy ERP, new S3 bucket, and on-prem file server into a single event stream consumed by downstream automation teams
Eliminated manual SSL certificate provisioning for a dozen operators by deploying an AWS ALB solution bridging cloud and on-premises systems, improving both security and user onboarding

Designed internal AI developer tooling to increase delivery velocity with LLMs, MCP, and custom steering files, including reusable AWS CDK construct libraries for Lambda, API Gateway, CloudFront, and event processors

positions.title: Intern, Software Engineer
responsibilities: Shipped a QR code generation service embedded in work tickets, replacing printed engineering packets as part of a company-wide paperless initiative, still in production with 1,000+ daily invocations
Reduced per-transaction fees by 0.2-0.5% on corporate transactions by implementing Level 2 data sharing in Braintree payment requests
Integrated PayPal Checkout into an Angular frontend, expanding payment options and reducing purchase friction

positions.title: Intern, Java Developer
responsibilities: Automated test execution against internal portals via JavaScript web scraping, cutting automation runtime by 80%
Built a cron job to replace manual team review of 17,000+ daily events, significantly reducing operational overhead
